feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Change processing status and release status in BADI_COND_SAVE_A
entry.content:
Hi,

Out customer wants to create sales pricing records (T-CODE VK11, Fiori App Manage Sales Prices (App ID F4111)). Unfortunately, in our version (SAP S4/PERSON_NAME DIGITS OnPrem) Workflow for sales prices is not available).

Our idea is to create conditions records with processing status Blocked so that in VK11/VK11/App F4111 the records needs to be then released by another user. To meet this requirement we implemented BADI BADI_COND_SAVE_A and modified the VADAT field (processing status) and the variable key (VARKEY/VAKEY/VAKE field depending on the program that is running). However, we cannot change the processing status and the release status in that BADI.

How can the processing status and the release status could be changed in that BADI? We would need to change several condition prices with different access sequences and tables.

Thanks,

entry.title: KMAT with KMAT in Bill of Material
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

i created a KMAT with a Bill of Material which consists of 4 Raw Materials and 1 additional KMAT. How do i need to set up the Configuration profile in order to be able to get the configuration option of the KMAT from the Bill of Material shown when i create a Sales order for the Header KMAT?


Thank you in Advance

Emir

entry.title: MF60 selection value problem
entry.content:
Hello, experts.

I can't add multiple values via MF60's selection areas.
For example :

I tried to enter the order number intervals.

After pressing "Enter", the field value changes to empty.

Also, using multiple selection area the field values couldn't select.
For example,


I want to select 2 order numbers. After pressing "Enter" buttons, the field values change to empty.
So, the pull list view is using to 1 or all orders.

Do you have any experience about this situation?

I hope, the situation is clear to you.
Waiting for the solutions soon.

Best regards

#MF60

entry.title: Fiori App for the approval of Service Entry Sheets _ ML85
entry.content:
In the Fiori apps library, the ML85 transactional app is not available to activate the approval of service entry sheet.

Kindly suggest how to activate the ML85 transactional Fiori app for the approval of service entry sheet.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP UI V9.0について
entry.content:
お世話になっております。

1) S/4HANAのコンポーネントでSAP UI V7.0というものがありこれが何を示しているのかわかりません。

2) 現在のバージョンの確認の仕方、サポート期限、最新バージョンの確認の仕方についても教えていただきたいです。

3) SAP UI2についても同様に教えていただきたいです。

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Differences in Registering Standard App References between Design Studio and Launchpad App Manager
entry.content:
Hi Launchpad experts,

In Fiori Launchpad, using Design Studio, it was possible to reference standard catalogs in custom technical catalogs. In this case, changes to the tiles in the standard catalog were automatically reflected in the tiles of the custom catalog.

In the Launchpad App Manager, I can copy App Descriptor Items from standard catalogs. However, the copied Items have different App Descriptor Item IDs from the original Items. Does this mean that changes to the tiles in the standard catalog will not be reflected in the copied custom catalog's tiles?

In the past, using Design Studio, it was possible to include all the apps (both standard and custom ones) used in a system in a single technical catalog, and refer to this technical catalog to create business catalogs.

With the Launchpad App Manager, if I want to register references to standard apps in a business catalog, do I need to refer to individual standard technical catalogs?

entry.title: GST IN : DCS : eDocument for Proforma Invoices in GST Reporting Node
entry.content:
GST IN : DCS : eDocument for Proforma Invoices in GST Reporting Node

entry.title: MD04 MRP
entry.content:
hi experts, when i run the MD04 screen,in sometimes doesn't occure requirement for compenent. Requirements are created for the base material but not for the components

Can anyone explain the why it is,

entry.title: Migration Cockpit Direct transfer - Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

Where are willing to migrate from a SAP ECC to a SAP S/4HANA system and we are wondering if we could use for the migration process the migration cockpit direct transfer from sap tool.

We would like to know if it's convenient to use these migration cockpit option instead of the data staging tables as we have searched that with these option there's no need to fill a file with the information needed and if we could use it with every single data migration object including transactional data (sales orders, accounts payable, accounts receivable, g/l balance) and master data (cost centers, accounts, ...)

If so, is there any chance that the process could affect the data that is reading from the SAP ECC system, as we have seen that is recommended to read from non-productive systems?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Additional fee for multiple users?
entry.content:
I am using AWS Cloud Service for using an appliance "SAP S/4HANA 2022 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance".

In the account using this cloud service, I have 3 users.

And 3 users need to use cloud simultaneously.

What I wonder is, does the number of users affect the cloud hosting fee?

entry.title: Hide "Post" bottom from create supplier invoice app.
entry.content:
I am trying to hide "Post" bottom from create supplier invoice app.

Our client would like to have supplier invoice approval mandatory.

Please let me know how.

Thank you.

entry.title: machine manufactured the relevant material
entry.content:
Hi experts!

How can I determine which machine manufactured the relevant material based on the material document?

Is there any relevant table for this issue,

entry.title: Visual Studio failing while adding the deployment configuration of the SAPUI5 application
entry.content: Visual Studio Code is throwing an error while I am trying to add the deployment configuration of the SAPUI5 application. The error message is "TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'www-authenticate') To continue with project generation choose a different deployment target or skip adding deploy config." Any guidance on fixing this issue is highly appreciated.

entry.title: SAP Cutover Plan
entry.content:
Hello Team,
Can anyone please mention the list of Cut-over activities/tasks that has to be addressed when moving from SAP R/3 to SAP S/4 HANA?

entry.title: Usage of sales kit CPFH and DISH in on-premise?
entry.content:
Hello,

İn cloud we have option to use 4 types of sales kits as in the picture but when I examine the help page for Hana it shows only 2 type of sales kits which are LUMF and ERLA. 

I need to use the CPFH scenario in my process but I want to use the standard one but even the item category group CPFH is not defined in the Hana system. Do I need to create all settings to use CPFH in my process? Additionally, the sub-item categories are different for the CPFH and DISH too. Is there any reason for we can not use it in the standard SAP system? Thank you

entry.title: MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).
entry.content:
Dear Expert ,

How to Solve this error i am unable to post my GRPO Document due to 

MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).*

*Transaction MMPV (period closing program) cannot be executed. For more information, see Note 1082841*

entry.title: Is it safe to use ENQUEUE_ESINDX in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are migrating to S/4HANA and our ATC lists all usage of ENQUEUE_ESINDX (Used to make sure sure program/table is only used by one person at a time) as priority 1 "error". In the attached SAP Note there's no mention of this FM specifically, it's a general note for SAP S/4HANA custom code adaption - removal of orphaned objects. 

I've tested the programs and this functionality specifically and it's still working just fine. Should I be worried this would be suddenly removed in a minor update in the future?

If I need to address this, what should I use instead of ENQUEUE_ESINDX and DEQUEUE_ESINDX?

Thanks,
Birgir Snorrason

entry.title: Changing career from B1 specialist to S/4HANA
entry.content: I have 15 years of experience in SAP business one as power user as I was a VP of a medium organization but I find the opportunities limited in terms of size of organizations and salary in comparison to SAP s/4HANA. Looking for suggestions such as I have some experience with course work in SAP Supply chain management in ECC, but I spent the majority of my time in Business one in the finance side of the things with a focus on marketing documents we would call it  (A/R and A/P invoices). I did various system upgrade in business one along with process and query optimizations.

entry.title: S/4HANA Readiness check does not provide quickfix in eclipse result browser
entry.content:
Hey there!

 

The main poblems seems to be that the function "Analyze Result in ATC Problems View" (right click on check run in ATC result browser, described in Semi-automatic custom code adaptation after SAP S/... - SAP Community) does not work properly. 

If we click this function, we only get:

We can click on a check run result, right-click on recheck and then the check will be displayed in the ATC problems view. But only for the selected entry. 

I expect that "Analyze Result in ATC Problems View" works properly.

What are we missing/ doing wrong so that the quickfixes are not available at first?

Thanks in advance
 ~Enno

entry.title: How to do the Synchronous B2BCustomer replication from SAP Commerce to S/4 Hana
entry.content:
We have came across a requirement to Integrate the Outbound B2BCustomer data from SAP Commerce to S/4 Hana public cloud using sync call.

As we have Asynchronous call in OOTB where we can send the data to CPI and we will not read the response data from CPI, how we can integrate the Outbound B2BCustomer data Synchronously .

Thank you
